Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4100 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Operation Anoria.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $9c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Operation Anoria.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $9C00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.. It then sets $0277 to $45 to force the game to start-up in the game over state.
To allow the game to jump to the title screen from the game over screen without pressing the fire button, the following changes were made:
1. The LDA $DC00 instruction at $8188 was patched to be JMP $9D00 instead. 2. A new routine was added at $9D00 which restores the LDA $DC00 instruction at $8188, before jumping to $81AB to go to the title screen.
